name: Mitsuha Miyamizu
description:
**Height:** 163 cm
~!**Age after timeskip:** 25-26!~

She lives in a small town called Itomori. She is a part of her family's shrine and participates in old traditions as a shrine maiden with her younger sister [Yotsuha](https://anilist.co/character/121518/Yotsuha-Miyamizu).
